meta.title: Calipso — Global Web Agency | Professional Websites Worldwide
meta.description: Calipso is a global web agency based in Genova, Italy. We build fast, scalable, legally compliant websites for businesses worldwide — SEO, e-commerce, AI optimization.
meta.keywords: global web agency, international web design, professional websites worldwide, SEO international, e-commerce global, web development, GDPR compliant, AI optimization, web agency Italy
hero.sub: We build websites that actually work — fast, beautiful, legally compliant, and ready for the AI search era. For clients anywhere in the world.
intro.label: About us
intro.text: We're a web agency based in Genova, Italy. We build websites for clients worldwide — sites that don't just exist: they work every single day to grow your business. Everything else is noise.
services.title: What we do
svc1.name: SEO & AI SEARCH
svc1.desc: Visible on Google in every market. Cited by ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity. International topical authority, Schema.org and GEO.
svc2.name: DESIGN & DEVELOPMENT
svc2.desc: Memorable interfaces, clean code, smooth animations. Accessible, fast, frictionless — for users anywhere in the world.
svc3.name: E-COMMERCE
svc3.desc: Catalog, multi-currency checkout, international payments, global tax compliance OSS/IOSS, worldwide shipping.
svc4.name: SECURITY & INFRASTRUCTURE
svc4.desc: WAF, 2FA, distributed backups, global CDN, 24/7 uptime monitoring across every continent.
svc5.name: PRIVACY & LEGAL
svc5.desc: GDPR, cookie banners, compliance with European and international regulations. Operational for clients in any jurisdiction.
svc6.name: AI & INNOVATION
svc6.desc: LLM chatbot trained on your data, proprietary RAG, optimization for AI search engines in every language.
process.p: No templates, no copy-paste solutions. Every project starts from a real analysis of your market — wherever you are in the world.
step1.title: DISCOVERY
step1.body: We understand who you are, what you sell, and to whom — in any market you operate. We analyze local and international competitors before opening any editor.
step2.title: STRATEGY
step2.body: Information architecture, wireframes, design system. Everything defined and approved together before writing a single line of code.
step3.title: DEVELOPMENT
step3.body: Iterative build with continuous reviews. Every component optimized for speed, accessibility, and international SEO. No shortcuts.
step4.title: LAUNCH & GROWTH
step4.body: Global deploy, monitoring, post-launch optimization. The launch isn't the end — it's the beginning of the real work.
get.p: Every project includes everything you need to be online, found by customers worldwide, and legally compliant — no surprises.
gc1.title: Extreme speed on every device
gc1.body: Optimized Core Web Vitals, WebP/AVIF images, global CDN. Your site loads in under a second, anywhere in the world.
gc2.title: Compliant from day one
gc2.body: GDPR, cookie banner, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy. European compliance recognized internationally as a gold standard.
gc3.title: Found on Google and AI engines
gc3.body: Optimization for ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity. Advanced Schema.org, llms.txt, multilingual GEO. Your brand in the future of global search.
gc4.title: WCAG 2.2 Standard
gc4.body: Usable by everyone, on every device and assistive technology, in any language.
gc5.title: Protected 24/7
gc5.body: WAF, HTTPS, security headers, 2FA, geographically distributed backups on global data centers.
gc6.title: Beautiful enough to stop you
gc6.body: Interfaces worth remembering. Smooth animations, dark mode, variable typography, micro-interactions. Design and function that speak — for any culture.
gc7.title: Green hosting
gc7.body: Renewable-energy servers, lightweight code, reduced carbon footprint. Good for the planet, good for business.
gc8.title: Installable as an app
gc8.body: Progressive Web App: your site available offline and on mobile like a native app, anywhere in the world.
gc9.title: Real data, no cookies
gc9.body: Server-Side Tracking and privacy-first analytics. Accurate data despite AdBlockers, compliant in every jurisdiction.
dl1.title: COMPLETE & OPTIMIZED WEBSITE
dl1.body: Clean, fast code, tested on all devices, browsers, and international markets.
dl2.title: LEGAL DOCUMENTATION
dl2.body: Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy and cookie banner compliant with European GDPR — recognized globally.
dl3.title: COMPLETE SEO SETUP
dl3.body: International meta tags, hreflang, Schema.org, XML sitemap, robots.txt, Search Console configured.
dl4.title: ANALYTICS CONFIGURED
dl4.body: Dashboard with the data that actually matters. Privacy-first, no profiling cookies, valid in any jurisdiction.
dl5.title: ALL CREDENTIALS & ACCESS
dl5.body: Full access to CMS, hosting, domain and tools — yours, forever.
dl6.title: USAGE GUIDE
dl6.body: Custom documentation to manage and update the site independently, whenever you want.
faq.p: Everything you want to know before starting. If you don't find your answer, write to us — we respond within 24 hours.
faq1.q: How much does a website cost?
faq1.a: The cost depends on project complexity. A quality institutional site starts at a base covering design, development, SEO, and legal compliance. An e-commerce or feature-rich project has a higher budget. Contact us for a free, transparent quote based on your real needs.
faq2.q: How long does it take to build a website?
faq2.a: An institutional site takes an average of 3–5 weeks from project approval to launch. An e-commerce or complex project takes 6–10 weeks. Timelines also depend on how quickly you provide feedback. We always give you a precise timeline before starting.
faq3.q: Can I manage the site myself after delivery?
faq3.a: Yes, absolutely. Every site is delivered with a custom guide explaining how to update text, images, and content independently. If your site uses a CMS (WordPress, Webflow, Sanity), the management interface is simple even without technical skills.
faq4.q: Will my site be optimized for Google internationally?
faq4.a: Yes. Every site includes international technical SEO: multilingual meta tags, hreflang, Schema.org structured data, XML sitemap, robots.txt, and Core Web Vitals optimization. For advanced multi-language editorial SEO campaigns, we offer dedicated plans.
faq5.q: Will my website be GDPR compliant?
faq5.a: Yes. Every site includes a Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, and cookie banner with preventive blocking and a "Reject" button, compliant with European GDPR. European compliance is recognized as a gold standard globally — a competitive advantage for clients operating internationally.
faq6.q: What happens after launch? Do you offer maintenance?
faq6.a: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance plans including technical updates, backups, uptime monitoring, continuous SEO optimizations, and content modification support. You're not required to subscribe — but we recommend having at least active backup and monitoring.
faq7.q: Do you work with clients outside Italy?
faq7.a: Absolutely — it's our primary model. We're based in Genova, Italy, but we serve clients across Europe, North America, the Middle East, and beyond. Our process is fully remote: video calls, document sharing, online reviews. Distance is never an issue.
faq8.q: Can I bring an existing site and have you improve it?
faq8.a: Yes. We do complete audits of existing sites: speed, SEO, accessibility, security, legal compliance, and international positioning. Based on the audit, we decide together whether to improve the current site or start fresh.
